coinio Your Trusted escrow service

It's time to Take Control of Your Cryptocurrency Transactions!

Get Started

  Welcome to coinio

coinio provides a safe crypto-currency escrow service for user transactions. A crypto-currency escrow is an arrangement between two parties where coinio holds payment of the funds (coinio) required to complete a transaction. The funds are kept secure until all of the terms of a transaction are met.

Truly Secure

coinio proprietary system will keep your funds truly secure during the entire transaction process.

Fully Compliant

It's good to know who you're dealing with, so we verify each and every user ensuring transactions are fully compliant.

Totally Awesome

We designed the coinio platform with everything needed to make your transaction experience totally awesome.

Arbitrator

coinio protects buyers from fraudulent sellers by requiring the coin to be deposited up front, before any money changes hands. In the event of a dispute, coinio service will act as the arbitrator and determine who should ultimately receive the coins.

Business

coinio system can empower your company with secure blockchain based data transfer and recordation. If you can imagine it, coinio can help you securely transfer it.

Multi-signature smart contracts:

coinio payment solution leverages multi-signature transactions to enable reversible e-commerce payments, where a trusted third party ? a trust agent ? is nominated to resolve disputes and reverse payments in case of fraud.

Perfect for Marketplaces

Bring buyers and sellers together so that they can trade with confidence. Focus on growing your business and let coinio® power your bitcoin & cryptocurrency payments with our easy to use blockchain solution.

Features

coinio® builds a layer of trust on top of blockchain technology to bring consumer protection and fraud prevention mechanisms to Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies. Our goal is to provide cryptocurrencies with tools that enable the market to self-regulate using user reputation, smart contracts and a voluntary (but binding) arbitration process.

Platform to Protect Cryptocurrencies Transactions.

We provide a marketplace for arbitration services where trust agents can compete for customers by providing quality dispute resolution services, utilizing their domain expertise, building a reputation and offering competitive fees.Because trust agents never hold user funds in escrow, we can greatly reduce compliance costs, lower the entry barriers, encourage competition and allow smaller and specialized players to participate in a way that was never possible before.

  • Safe and Secure: For years now, coinio® has securely stored a fortune at our two escrow vaults.
  • Fast and convienient: We offer custodianship to both new and existing clients. Our process are user friendly

Cryptocurrency Market Price

Cryptocurrency Markets by TradingView

coinio consists of basic features that will not only make your transactions safe, but also help build trust in the online community, Here are some of them, And by harnessing the power of smart exchangers, our funds management skills, we put the control of money back into your hands.
